title: Score your own series
wikitext:
[]: Score your own series...             Quote Post by Dartz » Fri Oct 10, 2008 7:06 pm I don't know. I did a search using threadlist and it turned up nothing that looked like so anyway. I was listening there to Nearer My God to thee on a youtube here and the first thing that struck me about it was how well it would fit into Asuka's battle scene from EoE. Might just be how the violin is played in that particular piece, but it did seem like it'd do quite a nice job. It had the right emotion, the right feeling of titanic struggle and death. I mean even the title 'Nearer my God to Thee' slips somewhat into the attaining of God through instrumentality. Or I'm just being dumb and tired because it's late Anyway, are there any pieces of music that you would replace in the series, and with what and why?

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Fri Oct 10, 2008 8:09 pm I have no idea what I'd replace it with, but I hate the 'cornball antics' song that often accompanies Asuka.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Oct 11, 2008 2:30 am I've played about a bit with alternate OP/ED for fan-fics; not a lot for the canon. The exception is that the first time I heard it, I thought that the closing movement of Redeemer = Motherfucker part 1 (of the Yanqui U.X.O album by Godspeed you! Black Emperor) would fit the UBF very nicely.

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Sun Oct 12, 2008 4:17 pm It would be funny to have This Magic Moment playing in the background of the Shinji/Asuka kiss scene. (I'll leave it to others to decide between the Drifters' version and the Jay and the Americans' version.)

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Sun Oct 12, 2008 4:42 pm I'd add a ton more 60's rock to it. Probably to ill effect.

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Wed Oct 15, 2008 11:01 am If you take the two halves of the battle with Sachiel from Episode 02, edit them together to form one sequence, and then play "Mona Lisa Overdrive" from the Matrix Reloaded score on top of it, they will sync up almost perfectly. (I say 'almost' because the music does run longer than the battle sequence and requires pruning at the very end.) I successfully produced an example at one time, but lost the video file during the tragic end of ARQ 01. I might make another one when I have the time--that is, unless one of you would like to beat me to it.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed Oct 15, 2008 12:03 pm The soundtrack should be nothing but "Surfin' Bird" playing incessantly.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Oct 15, 2008 12:21 pm Oh god.... Just what we need, Shinji dancing around like crazy and singing about how "the bird is the word" until Asuka kicks his ass. Anyway, I say that (if this counts?) Eva could have benefited from more of the S2 Works pieces. I could really see M-13 as being a great battle music piece...

[]:             Quote Post by Dramamine » Wed Oct 15, 2008 10:38 pm NAveryW wrote: The soundtrack should be nothing but "Surfin' Bird" playing incessantly.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Wed Oct 15, 2008 11:00 pm Or Charamelldansen.

[]:             Quote Post by Dramamine » Wed Oct 15, 2008 11:09 pm Action_Bastard wrote: Or Charamelldansen.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Thu Oct 16, 2008 9:15 am If I were to re-score Evangelion, it would be with all Wagner music. Wagner was probably the biggest influence on this series. Isn't it obvious guys?

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Thu Oct 16, 2008 9:18 am Brik, of course. Now that I think about it, 13 hours of Lord Kamina's theme would make a nice background for the series.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Oct 16, 2008 1:01 pm Even better, CC: Instead of Fly me to the Moon playing at the end of the credits, we'd have one of the different version of Rap is a man's soul! (Raw raw fight da powa) playing instead! ;)

[]:             Quote Post by Dartz » Thu Oct 16, 2008 1:59 pm If that is the case, There must be a Libera me from Hell in there somewhere... prefereably as Shinji fights the 14th Angel. Or maybe Rei against the 16th. Some Crowning moment of awesome.. Of course it would havee to be reanimated to fit the epicness.

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Thu Oct 16, 2008 11:50 pm I honestly think the show works best with classical or jazz music. My 2 cents.

[]:             Quote Post by Barinax » Sat Oct 18, 2008 12:26 pm Iron Rooster wrote: I honestly think the show works best with classical or jazz music. My 2 cents.

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Sat Oct 18, 2008 1:46 pm Yeah, but people are suggesting stuff that's definitely not in those categories.

[]:             Quote Post by Zerogoki » Sat Oct 18, 2008 8:22 pm 12 bar blues, baby! #My mom got sucked into a robot, And my dad wishes I was dead, Now I live with a drunk and a penguin And there's an angel wants in on my bed...#

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Fri Oct 24, 2008 4:36 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Oh god.... Just what we need, Shinji dancing around like crazy and singing about how "the bird is the word" until Asuka kicks his ass. <snip>
